app_caption: AI Botanical R&D Decision Intelligence Platform
core_workflow_info: Define project → understand the question → optionally collect fresh online evidence → discover R&D candidates: known inventory, alternative plants, scoring, and decision table.
database_load_error: Could not load Supabase evidence database preview.
candidate_count: Number of global plant candidates to analyze
pubmed_results: Online PubMed results per candidate plant
regulatory_disclaimer: This is general, market-level regulatory context — not a plant-specific or product-specific legal opinion. Verify against the actual ingredient, formulation, and supplier before commercial use.
question_summary: Find and rank global medicinal plants and active compounds for **{product_type}** as **{dosage_form}** for **{indication}** in **{market}**.
rd_caption: Starts from your product/problem, lists what is already known, then searches for better or alternative botanical sources of the same active compounds.
known_inventory: Step 1 — Known inventory for this problem
no_inventory: No known plants/compounds/targets for '{indication}' yet in the seed knowledge base. Extend seed_data.py to add it.
inventory_count: {plants} known plant(s), {compounds} known compound(s) already catalogued for this problem.
reference_plant_help: Leave empty to analyze every known plant for this indication.
live_search: Include live Europe PMC search (slower, needs internet)
no_candidates: No known plants/compounds found for this indication in the seed knowledge base yet. Add entries to seed_data.py to extend coverage.
market_caption: What already exists in the market for these plants: EU regulatory status, patents, and retail/brand products.
check_market: Check market landscape for these plants
spinner_market: Checking regulatory status, patents, and retail presence...
patent_not_configured: Patent search isn't configured yet. Set EPO_OPS_KEY / EPO_OPS_SECRET to enable it.
retail_not_configured: Retail/brand product scanning needs a paid search API. Set SEARCH_API_KEY once you've picked a provider.
no_profile: No profile found for this plant.
